subject: [PATCH v6 02/10] mm/memory_hotplug: add mhp_online_type_to_str() and export string helpers

2026-06-30.patch_summary: This patch adds two functions to the Linux kernel: mhp_online_type_to_str() and its inverse mhp_online_type_from_str(). The new function allows drivers to convert memory online types into human-readable strings, while the existing function does the opposite. This enables drivers to render and parse memory online types through their own sysfs interfaces.
